form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 8 at Ararat Bm56 on March 30 over 1606m, 1.3 len behind The Daily Planet carrying 60.5kg at $7.50. The run before that won by 0.8 len at this track Bm56 March 22 over 1535m defeating Elvis carrying 60.5kg at $2.90. Consistent type who gets in well after the claim for a rider on the rise.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced three-wide without cover throughout.
Bumped heavily on jumping away by Tel Aviv.
Raced wide without cover for the majority of the event.
Laid in under pressure in the straight. Near the 400m, shifted ground.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd of 7 at Pakenham 0 - 62 on March 26 over 1400m, on a wet track; 1.5 len behind Captain Cat with 57.5kg at $7. The race before that ran on from midfield and won by 1.3 len at Swan Hill Bm56 March 15 over 1300m defeating Pro Aussie carrying 60.5kg at $14. Strong winner two back then not beaten far up in grade last time.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months ran last of 10 at Terang Bm56 on March 17 over 1406m, slow going 12 len behind Eleanor Dumont carrying 61.5kg at $41. Previously second-up won by 0.5 len at St Arnaud Mdn-Sw October 25 over 1550m defeating Stolen Stock carrying 57kg at $6.50. That run was a bit plain so prefer him later on.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign fourth of 9 at Warrnambool Bm62 October 30 over 2000m, 1.5 len behind Mangione carrying 68kg at $2.70. When resuming last campaign third of 12 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw August 21 over 1400m, soft track; 4 len behind Grugnito carrying 59.5kg at $4.80. Will be better over further but has placed in 2 of 3 first-up runs and trials have been encouraging.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced three-wide without cover until near the 1000m.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 10 at Sale Bm62 on March 29 over 1717m, on a slow track; 11 len behind High Tempo carrying 58.5kg at $6.50. The run before that 4th of 11 at Pakenham Bm62 on March 5 over 1600m, 3 len behind Nic's Choice carrying 58.5kg at $17. Should be at peak fitness now and will find this easier than recent starts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 1100m, taken in by Stay Silent.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up from last on the turn 6th of 8 at Moe 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Hook 'N' Spur with 54kg at $11. Second-up favourite; came from midfield and won by 0.5 len at Terang Mdn-Sw March 17 over 1406m in soft going defeating License To Excite carrying 57kg at $3.20. Finishing powerfully to break the maiden last start and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 40-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 8 at Colac Bm56 on March 1 over 2000m, slow going 3 len behind Quick Qudos carrying 60.5kg at $2.45. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Colac 0 - 62 on February 6 over 2000m, 5 len behind Kingsford with 57.5kg at $4.40. Draw a hit to her chances, but it was only three starts back she was runner-up in town.
